Description: Form inputs without associated labels"
Do: Use <label> with for/id or aria-label
Don't: Don't use placeholder as only label

Description: Forms without real-time validation feedback"
Do: Show inline validation, error messages, success states
Don't: Don't only validate on submit

Description: Missing autocomplete attributes on forms"
Do: Add autocomplete attribute for common fields
Don't: Don't force users to re-enter known information

Keywords: input type, email, phone, number, date
Description: Using text type for all inputs"
Do: Use appropriate input types (email, tel, number, date)
Don't: Don't use type='text' for everything

Description: Interactive elements not keyboard accessible"
Do: Ensure all interactive elements are keyboard navigable
Don't: Don't rely only on mouse interactions
Code Example Good: All buttons/links naturally keyboard accessible; custom widgets need tabindex + key handlers
Code Example Bad: 'div with onclick but no tabindex or key handler'

Description: Modal dialogs without proper focus management"
Do: Trap focus in modals, provide Escape to close
Don't: Don't trap focus without escape route
Severity: 'Modal opens but focus goes to background'

Description: No way to skip repetitive navigation"
Do: Add skip navigation link as first focusable element
Don't: Don't force keyboard users to tab through entire nav

Description: Interactive elements without proper ARIA roles"
Do: Add appropriate role attributes for custom widgets
Don't: Don't use divs for interactive elements without roles

Description: Dynamic content updates not announced to screen readers"
Do: Use aria-live regions for dynamic content updates
Don't: Don't update content without announcing to assistive tech

Description: Using ARIA attributes incorrectly or unnecessarily"
Do: Use native HTML semantics first, add ARIA only when needed
Don't: Don't add ARIA to native HTML elements that already have semantics

Description: Not preconnecting to third-party origins"
Do: Add preconnect hints for critical third-party domains
Don't: Don't wait until resource loading to establish connection

Description: Loading all images eagerly including below-fold"
Do: Add loading='lazy' to below-fold images
Don't: Don't load all images immediately

Description: Large CSS/JS blocking initial render"
Do: Inline critical CSS, defer non-critical JS
Don't: Don't load all CSS/JS synchronously
Code Example Good: '<link rel="stylesheet" href="critical.css"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="full.css" media="print" onload="this.media=all">'

Keywords: semantic, html5, article, section, nav, main
Description: Using divs instead of semantic HTML elements"
Do: Use semantic HTML5 elements (article, section, nav, main, aside)
Don't: Don't use divs for everything

Keywords: heading, h1, h2, h3, hierarchy, structure
Description: Skipping heading levels (h1 to h3)"
Do: Maintain logical heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3)
Don't: Don't skip heading levels for styling

Description: External links opening in same tab without indication"
Do: Add target='_blank' + rel='noopener' for external links, indicate external visually
Don't: Don't open external links in same tab without warning
Code Example Good: 'External (opens in new tab)'

Description: Links without href or with href='#'"
Do: Ensure all links have meaningful href or use button for actions
Don't: Don't create links without destinations

Description: No viewport meta tag"
Do: Add <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'>
Don't: Don't omit viewport meta tag"

Description: Using fixed pixel widths instead of fluid layouts"
Do: Use max-width, percentage, or viewport units
Don't: Don't use fixed widths larger than viewport

Description: Not setting proper HTTP cache headers"
Do: Set appropriate Cache-Control, ETag headers
Don't: Don't serve static assets without caching

Description: No Content Security Policy headers"
Do: Implement Content Security Policy to prevent XSS
Don't: Don't rely only on input sanitization

Description: Serving content over HTTP"
Do: Use HTTPS for all content, redirect HTTP to HTTPS
Don't: Don't serve any content over plain HTTP

Description: Fonts causing flash of invisible/unstyled text"
Do: Use font-display: swap for web fonts
Don't: Don't let fonts block text rendering

Description: Not preloading critical resources"
Do: Preload critical fonts, images, CSS
Don't: Don't load critical resources lazily

Description: Forms without proper error message display"
Do: Show clear error messages near the relevant input
Don't: Don't show generic error at top of form
